scripts.build:binary:all: bun build --compile --minify src/main.ts --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/together-sandbox-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --minify src/main.ts --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/together-sandbox-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --minify src/main.ts --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/together-sandbox-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --minify src/main.ts --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/together-sandbox-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --minify src/main.ts --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/together-sandbox-windows-x64.exe
